name: INUZUKA RYU: TSUUGA (INUZUKA STYLE: PIERCING FANG)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 3

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: Mas, Mob

You must be using either the Shikakyu no Jutsu technique or the Feral Combat class ability in order to use this technique, and there must be enough space be- tween you and the target to execute a charge attack. Make a charge attack with a claw or feral combat attack. If it hits, you may add your Strength modifier to the damage twice (instead of the normal once), and you ignore up to 5 hardness.

Animal companions can use this technique, but only while affected by Juujin Bunshin no Jutsu.

Mastery: Each step allows you to ignore an additional point of hardness.

The fifth step allows you to spend 8 additional Chakra to make an additional attack at your highest attack bonus -5. This can only be done once per encounter, and only if you have at least 6 levels of Beastmaster.
